item.name: Azure Bastion REST API List operations

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Azure Bastion provides secure RDP and SSH access to virtual machines through the Azure portal without exposing public IPs. The REST API manages bastion hosts and configuration.
